title: Prediction Market Metadata
description: Schema for IPFS metadata JSON stored per prediction market

title.description: Short market question (e.g. 'Will the green car win the race?')

description.description: Full resolution criteria. Gemini reads this to determine the outcome.

outcomes.description: Ordered list of outcomes. Index matches CTF partition indexSet.

resolutionTime.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when CRE will attempt AI resolution

imageUrl.description: Optional banner image URL for the market card

example.title: Will the green car win the race?
example.description: Resolves YES if car #7 (green livery, team Alpine) finishes in 1st place at the 2024 Monaco Grand Prix. Result must be official before dispute window close. Source: formula1.com official results.
